title: pteris minor
intro: Pteris minor, also known as the ladder fern or bristly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pteris minor include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
